n_hook.text: Somewhere on your Mac, an agent just finished something big. And it's not the only one. Two agents. Ten. Twenty. The more you run, the harder it is to know what they're doing, and to keep them all on track. Your agents are talking. <break time="1.2s" /> Attashay is listening.

n_title.text: This is atta-shay. It gives your agents a voice.

n_pin.text: Press Command K, and pin the sessions you care about. Attashay only ever speaks about what you pin.

n_inbox.text: Every finished turn lands like voicemail. Spoken out loud, captioned word for word. Pause it, scrub it, speed it up, replay it. Or hit Recap, and catch up in one pass.

n_ambient.text: Between updates, leave it in the corner. You can see what your agents are up to at a glance. And when something matters, it speaks up.

n_live.text: Or go lyve and talk to it. It knows everything that's running, and you can see exactly what it's doing, in real time.

n_two_a.text: And here's the part nobody else does. Tell your agent its next move. Out loud.

n_two_b.text: Attashay locks the target, waits for the session to go quiet, delivers, and reads the answer back the moment it lands.

n_personalities.text: You decide how it talks. Pick a preset, write your own, or just have fun with it. Updates from your agents don't have to be boring.

n_brain.text: It watches Claude Code and Codex, but it thinks with its own model. Run it fully local on your Mac, or reach for the frontier. And if one model runs dry, the next one steps in, mid-conversation.

n_outro.text: Attashay. <break time="0.7s" /> Give your agents a voice.

va_memo.text: Episode fourteen is cut into five clips. Captioned, and queued to post.

va_live.text: Clip two tested strongest. Retention held all the way through. Want me to post it?

va_reply.text: Codex replied: clip two is posted. The rest are scheduled, one a day at nine.

vs_editor.text: Five clips, captioned and queued. But clip two's hook is weak. Want me to recut it?

vs_cowboy.text: Well howdy, partner. Them five little clips is all branded up and corralled, ready to ride out at first light.

sfx_whoosh.prompt: smooth airy cinematic whoosh transition, soft and clean, short, no music

sfx_hit.prompt: deep cinematic bass hit with a soft sub drop, clean, single impact, short

sfx_pop.prompt: soft subtle UI pop, gentle click, pleasant, very short, single

sfx_ding.prompt: gentle two-note success chime, soft, warm, short, single

bed.prompt: Minimal ambient electronic underscore for a modern tech product film. Warm evolving synth pads, subtle slow pulse, understated and confident, gently building, instrumental, no melody hooks, no vocals.
